stories.image_alt: Nostalgia, tiny treats and tea rituals: why niche comfort culture is winning spring 2026

stories.title: China softens tone on Taiwan after opposition leader’s Beijing visit, but the bigger contest remains unresolved
stories.dek: Xi Jinping’s meeting with Taiwan’s opposition leader produced a brief thaw in cross-strait rhetoric, yet the island’s security debate, defense spending fight and looming U.S.-China diplomacy keep the stakes high.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: China softens tone on Taiwan after opposition leader’s Beijing visit, but the bigger contest remains unresolved

stories.title: Madonna’s ‘Confessions on a Dance Floor: Part II’ turns a pop-era classic into a 2026 comeback story
stories.dek: The queen of reinvention is returning to the sound that once reset her career, with a sequel album due July 3 and plenty of questions about what a 21st-century dance-floor confession sounds like.

stories.title: Sudan war enters fourth year as aid pledges rise, but fighting keeps the crisis out of reach
stories.dek: As Sudan marks three years since war exploded in Khartoum, diplomats are pledging more money and stronger coordination. But displacement, hunger and front-line violence continue to overwhelm relief efforts.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Sudan war enters fourth year as aid pledges rise, but fighting keeps the crisis out of reach
